notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. POC + verifier-v1 artifacts reused from C3 err-1-rep2 (POC-side scaffolding not ablated per L0 spec, same POC sha). Single predicate isErrReturnFunction identifies int-returning functions with `int err = 0;` initializer and `return err;` tail. Assembly clause finds failure-branch goto inside an if-then whose then-block contains no assignment to err (both _buggy and _fixed shapes fire in this zero-shot variant since the assembly doesn't reason about the sibling if-branches; L0 accepts on compile-success alone per spec §2 Stage 5).
